blocks.text: Wærenskjold chases Spring Classic glory at Gent-Wevelgem
🚴 Gent-Wevelgem 11:00 — Wærenskjold leads Norway's charge in wind-swept Flanders coast classic
♟️ Wed 16:00 — Carlsen opens FIDE Candidates — the road to the World Championship starts here
Barca lead La Liga by 4 points over Real Madrid — a slip at the Metropolitano (where Real Madrid won 3-2 last week) could ignite a real title race. Real Madrid host Mallorca the same evening.
